body.message: Ollama Cloud is configured and ready.

usage.python: from ollama import Client; client = Client(host='https://ollama.com', headers={'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + os.environ.get('OLLAMA_API_KEY')})
usage.javascript: const ollama = new Ollama({ host: 'https://ollama.com', headers: { Authorization: 'Bearer ' + process.env.OLLAMA_API_KEY } })

body.available_models: 40+ cloud models including: qwen3-coder:480b, deepseek-v4-pro, kimi-k2.6, gpt-oss:120b, devstral-small-2
body.note: Use cloud models (no -cloud suffix needed for API calls). Local Ollama server still runs for small models.
